variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16684 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16684 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16684 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 163.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 126.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 95.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 306.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 305.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 29.5 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P628324 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16684
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P628324 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16684
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Replacement Filters? Replacement filters for Fleetguard Optiair Air Cleaners deliver superior performance and proven protection. • High-efficiency cellulose media is a proven performer across a wide range of heavy-duty diesel engine applications. • Unique sawtooth design compresses to cushion and hold the filter in place, providing a secure seal – even in severe environments. • RadialSeal™ design allows for fast filter changes. • Durable structural support protects filters from damage or collapse in heavy vibration applications or humid conditions.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 16 501 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16684
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 16 501 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16684
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 165.0 mm, Dimension B: 129.0 mm, Dimension H: 309.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26364 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16684
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF26364 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16684
variants.description: Fleetguard® OptiAir™ AF26364 primary air element addresses key design requirements of all equipment manufacturers while outperforming conventional radial seal designs. Resulting in extended service intervals, reduced downtime, and lower maintenance costs.
